scripts.build: pnpm run lex:build && wxt build -b chrome
scripts.build:chrome: pnpm run lex:build && wxt build -b chrome
scripts.build:firefox: pnpm run lex:build && wxt build -b firefox
scripts.build:safari: pnpm run lex:build && wxt build -b safari
scripts.build:repo: pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run build:firefox && pnpm run build:safari
scripts.lex:build: pnpm exec lex build --clear --lexicons ./lexicons --out ./src/lexicons && tsx scripts/prepare-generated-lexicons.ts
scripts.lex:install: pnpm exec lex install app.bsky.feed.post app.bsky.actor.profile com.atproto.repo.createRecord com.atproto.repo.deleteRecord com.atproto.repo.describeRepo com.atproto.repo.getRecord com.atproto.repo.listRecords com.atproto.repo.putRecord com.atproto.repo.uploadBlob
scripts.lex:sync: pnpm run lex:install && pnpm run lex:build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.devnet:logs: docker compose -f devnet/docker-compose.yml -f devnet/docker-compose.test.yml --project-directory devnet logs -f
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run lex:build && vitest run --project unit
